title: heleniastrum glaucum
intro: Heleniastrum glaucum, also known as Helichrysum glaucum, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to South Africa. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its essential oils, which contain anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Heleniastrum glaucum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and aid in wound healing, as well as its potential to help alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Heleniastrum glaucum are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
